title: palura paniculata var. glabra
intro: Palura paniculata var. glabra, also known as smooth palura, is a variety of the Palura paniculata plant, a species of tree native to tropical regions of Asia and the Pacific. The bark and roots of the plant have been traditionally used in herbal medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. Smooth palura has been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, and has been reported to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving immune function. The plant can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional herbal remedies in its native regions.
